pages.full_text:
Barn across from Arizona swimming pool

[continuing from previous page] had Sunday lunch - lasagna & roast veal + pote - for £40. I've done 2 loads of wash at vast expense £4, much to Simon's horror. Blissfully hot, but bearable with lots of trees.
	The man next to us on crutches has a very amusing green parrot called Loretto. His wife bops it when it screeds too much. She has great trouble getting
photo_captions: Barn across from Arizona swimming pool
pages.notes: Page begins mid-sentence (continuation from previous page). Top half has a pencil sketch of a barn with pencil caption 'Barn across from Arizona swimming pool'. 'Arizona' appears to be a campsite name. 'pote' may be an abbreviation for 'potatoes'. The word before 'screeds' could be 'screeches' abbreviated or 'screeds' as written — taken as written. No handwritten page number visible in top-left corner. Text continues onto right page.

pages.full_text:
House across from camping van at Arizona.

it into a cage at night time.
	On Saturday evening at 6:15. an old Franciscan came round ringing a handbell "la Santa Messa alle sette". They set up an alter in the ping pong shed. The children came & went, a lovely service. I could watch the boys on the slide & swings behind the altar.
	We have spent our time eating & swimming. John & William did a [illegible] of
photo_captions: House across from camping van at Arizona.
pages.notes: Top half has a pencil sketch of a house with landscape, with pencil caption 'House across from camping van at Arizona.' The text 'la Santa Messa alle sette' is Italian for 'the Holy Mass at seven' — suggests the campsite is in Italy. 'alter' is written as-is (likely 'altar'). 'screeds' on left page may be 'screeches'. The handwritten number '15' appears in the top-right corner but could be a page number. The page number 15 is uncertain — it may read '15' or another number. Text continues on next page. No year can be confirmed from this page alone; context suggests Italy trip within 1989-2003 range.
